name: Stickman Kingdom Clash
author: Poki
description: Can you hear the drums of war? Stickman Kingdom Clash is a battle strategy game in which you conquer rival kingdoms by carefully preparing a powerful army. Upgrade your gold mine, strategize for the fight, deploy your units on the battlefield, and support them with amazing abilities! The more you play, the more exotic units you can unlock such as a Berserker, Gunner, Catapult, or a Giant! What's more, you can customize your soldiers with an almost unlimited combinations of skins! Are you ready to claim the throne accross an epic campaign? How do I play Stickman Kingdom Clash? Use the mouse and click to upgrade your mine, use powerful abilities, and spawn in your units! Who created Stickman Kingdom Clash? Stickman Kingdom Clash is created by GameGULF. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Stickman Kingdom Clash for free? You can play Stickman Kingdom Clash for free on Poki. Can I play Stickman Kingdom Clash on mobile devices and desktop? Stickman Kingdom Clash can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
